$meta.formula: magic dmg = base * MP/100 * (1 + GP/100); physical dmg = base * (MP+GP)/100
$meta.desc_note: VERBATIM game data (0.9.4.x). Damage formulas evaluate with current Magic Power (MP) and Geomantic Power (GEO).

skills.desc: Summons runic boulder: 4 Arcane to adjacent enemies, 75% knockback. Each boulder: 1 stack 'Runic Empowerment' (+5% Magic Power, +10% Geomantic Power, -10% Abilities Cost, -3 Energy/turn upkeep). Max 3 boulders; durability scales with Max Energy. Enemy-destroyed boulder: Confuses caster 4-6 turns, 4 Arcane to caster.
skills.dyn:
Summons a runic boulder on the targeted tile, dealing {6*(1+(GEO-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage to every enemy adjacent to it and with {75*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance knocking them back.

Each boulder grants the caster 1 stack of "Runic Empowerment":
+5% Magic Power
+10% Geomantic Power
-10% Abilities Energy Cost
-3 Energy Replenishment

Only 3 boulders can be summoned simultaneously, and their Durability depends on the caster's Max Energy.

Boulders fall apart when they leave the caster's Vision or if the caster runs out of Energy.

When a boulder is destroyed by enemies, Confuses the caster for 4-6 turns and deals {6*(1+(GEO-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage to them.

skills.desc: 'Stone Armor' 4 turns (+4 per Runic Empowerment stack): +15% Physical Res, +20% Nature Res, +15% Magic Res, +20% Bleed/Move/Control Res. On expiry/recast explodes: 6 Arcane + 4 Crushing to adjacent, 50% knockback (+100% Crushing per hit taken, max 30). Summoning boulders +2 turns.
skills.dyn:
Activates "Stone Armor" for 4 turns (+4 turns for each stack of "Runic Empowerment"):
+15% Physical Resistance
+20% Nature Resistance
+15% Magic Resistance
+20% Bleed Resistance
+20% Move Resistance
+20% Control Resistance

Summoning runic boulders prolongs the effect's duration by 2 turns.

When the effect expires or is activated again, the armor explodes, dealing {6*(MP+GEO)/200} Arcane and {6*(MP+GEO)/200} Crushing Damage to all adjacent targets, and with {50*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance Knocking them back.

The Crushing Damage increases by 100% for each strike or shot received over the course of the effect (but no more than {3*WIL}).

skills.desc:
Grants -5% Damage Taken and -5% Backfire Damage Change for each adjacent runic boulder.

Grants boulders -25% Damage Taken.

Reduces the sustain cost of adjacent boulders to 1 Energy per turn.
Destroys chosen boulder: 12 Piercing + 3 Crushing to tiles adjacent to it, 40% knockback; summons stone spikes on empty adjacent tiles 8 turns.
skills.dyn:
Destroys the chosen runic boulder, dealing {14*(MP+GEO)/200} Piercing and {3*(MP+GEO)/200} Crushing Damage to all tiles adjacent to it, and with {40*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance knocks the affected targets back.

Then, if the adjacent tiles are empty, summons stone spikes on them, which persist for 8 turns.

The spikes' Durability depends on the caster's Max Energy.

skills.desc: Applies enemies with -5% Physical Resistance, -5% Move Resistance, and -5% Control Resistance for each runic boulder adjacent to them.

While affected by "Stone Armor", remaining on the same tile grants -5% Cooldowns Duration, +8% Crit Avoidance, and +10% Energy Restoration for 5 turns.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.
Destroys chosen boulder: 5x5 earthquake 8 turns. Inside: 3 Crushing/turn, burns 3% Max Energy (max 10), 5% Daze 3 turns, -5% Control Res and -10% Move Res (stacks, persists).
skills.dyn:
Destroys the chosen runic boulder, creating an earthquake in a 5x5 tile area, which persists for 8 turns.

Remaining in the earthquake:
Deals {4*(MP+GEO)/200} Crushing Damage
Burns {3*(MP+GEO)/200}% Max Energy (but no more than {WIL})
Has {5*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance to cause Daze for 3 turns
Applies with -5% Control Resistance and -10% Move Resistance (the effect stacks and persists until the spell expires).

skills.desc: Summoning a runic boulder grants +7.5% Energy Restoration for 5 turns and reduces the ability tree's cooldowns by 1 turn for each stack of "Runic Empowerment".

Allows the character to simultaneously summon 4 runic boulders.

If a boulder is within 2 tiles of the character, its destruction by enemies no longer Confuses or deals Arcane Damage.

Destroys chosen boulder: 66% Petrify adjacent targets 2 turns (+2 per Empowerment stack over I). Petrified taking damage: +6 Pure Damage, body parts -3% condition (1/turn). +20% Geomantic Power per Petrified enemy in Vision.
skills.dyn:
Destroys the chosen runic boulder and with {66*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance applies all targets adjacent to it with Petrification for 2 turns (+2 turns for each stack of "Runic Empowerment" over I).

When a Petrified target receives damage, additionally deals {6*(1+(GEO-100)/100)} Pure Damage to it and worsens the Condition of its body parts by 3% (no more than once per turn).

Each Petrified enemy within Vision grants +20% Geomantic Power.

skills.desc:
Destroying a runic boulder to use the ability tree's spells deals Arcane Damage to all targets adjacent to it.
The damage dealt is equal to 3% of the current Energy, increasing by 100% for each stack of "Runic Empowerment" above I.
Destroys chosen boulder: 8 Arcane + 8 Crushing to 5x5, 40% knockback, 25% Stun. +5% Max Energy per enemy in area.
skills.dyn:
Destroys the chosen runic boulder, dealing {8*(1+(GEO-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane and {10*(MP+GEO)/200} Crushing Damage to all targets in a 5x5 tile area.

With {40*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance knocks the affected targets back and with {25*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance Stuns them.

Replenishes 5% Max Energy for each enemy within the spell's area of effect.

skills.desc: Throws chosen boulder: 12 Crushing + 6 Arcane; 70% knockback, 15% Stun or Daze.
skills.dyn:
Throws the chosen runic boulder at a targeted tile, dealing {14*(MP+GEO)/200} Crushing and {7*(1+(GEO-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage.

Hitting the target with {70*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance knocks it back and with {15*(MP+GEO)/200}% chance Stuns or Dazes it.

Each tile of distance to the target increases the throw's damage by 12% and also increases the duration of the applied Stun or Daze.

skills.desc:
Each turn, runic boulders burn 2% Max Energy of all enemies adjacent to them for each stack of "Runic Empowerment", replenishing the same amount of Energy to the character, and prolong all their active cooldowns by 1 turn.

The effect doesn't stack.
